supermajority_detail.const_amend: LRCA: majority vote in one session
supermajority_detail.notes: A 3/4 vote is required to overturn vetoes of emergency bills.

supermajority_detail.notes: A 3/4 vote is required to overturn vetoes of emergency bills.

ballot_measures.number: Designate Drug Cartels as Terrorist Organizations and Require State DHS to Address Threats Measure
ballot_measures.title: Designate Drug Cartels as Terrorist Organizations and Require State DHS to Address Threats Measure
ballot_measures.description: Declare drug cartels to be terrorist organizations. This legislative referendum is on the Arizona 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.number: Limit Local Tax Rate on Groceries to 2% of Base Price and Require Voter Approval to Increase Tax Rate Measure
ballot_measures.title: Limit Local Tax Rate on Groceries to 2% of Base Price and Require Voter Approval to Increase Tax Rate Measure
ballot_measures.description: Prohibit local government from imposing or increasing a tax on the sale of food items without voter approval and cap the tax rate at 2%. This legislative referendum is on the Arizona 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.number: Prohibit Taxes or Fees on Miles Traveled in Motor Vehicle Amendment
ballot_measures.title: Prohibit Taxes or Fees on Miles Traveled in Motor Vehicle Amendment
ballot_measures.description: Prohibit the state and local governments from imposing taxes or fees based on vehicle miles traveled and from enacting rules to monitor or limit vehicle miles traveled without the person’s consent. This legislatively referred constitutional amendment is on the Arizona 2026 ballot.
